name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents with parallel orchestration, plan-first workflows, dual-agent QA automation (L1.5 functional depth), structured result schemas, failure escalation rules, session logging, and .supervisor/ state management. 11 agent roles with YAML frontmatter (color, disallowedTools, per-agent hooks, maxTurns): Launch Pad (Supervisor readiness with codebase analysis and jobs lifecycle), Supervisor v4 (parallel orchestrator with merge safety gate), Execute Manager (Phase 3 poll loop with worker/reviewer lifecycle), Context-Keeper (externalized state with concurrency model), Worker (isolated implementation with schema-validated results), Product Owner (business requirements), Orchestrator (task planning), Code Reviewer (quality gates with memory), Red Team Reviewer (adversarial audits with memory), QA Strategist (risk-based test strategy, audit with interaction depth enforcement), and QA Executor (discovery-driven functional tests, session-based scoping, CRUD/form/modal test generation). Features 44 reusable skills with version tracking, structured result schemas (WORKER_RESULT, EXECUTE_RESULT, QA_RESULT, QA_SESSION, CODE_REVIEW_RESULT), failure escalation rules, architecture contracts, 5 quality gate hooks (SubagentStop for worker, execute-manager, code-reviewer, qa-executor + TaskCompleted), and persistent agent memory across 6 agents.
